search.query: |rest /servicesNS/admin/Bitdefender-TI-Splunk-App/alerts/fired_alerts| where title!="-"| dedup title| rename "eai:acl.app" as app | where app="Bitdefender-TI-Splunk-App" | dedup app| table title, app

|rest /servicesNS/admin/$app$/alerts/fired_alerts| where title!="-"| dedup title | rename "eai:acl.app" as app | where app="Bitdefender-TI-Splunk-App" | eval encoded_title = replace(title, " ", "%20") | dedup title |dedup encoded_title| table title, app,encoded_title

|rest /servicesNS/admin/$app$/alerts/fired_alerts/$alert_name$ | where title!="-"| eval _time=trigger_time, earliest_time=if(replace("$time.earliest$","\d[\.\d]*","")!="",relative_time(now(),"$time.earliest$"),"$time.earliest$"), latest_time=case(replace("$time.latest$","\d[\.\d]*","")!="",relative_time(now(),if("$time.latest$"="now", "-0","$time.latest$")),"$time.latest$"="", relative_time(now(),"-0"), 1=1, "$time.latest$")|where trigger_time>=earliest_time AND trigger_time < latest_time | timechart span=1d count

|rest /servicesNS/admin/$app$/alerts/fired_alerts/$alert_name$| where title!="-" | eval _time=trigger_time, earliest_time=if(replace("$time.earliest$","\d[\.\d]*","")!="",relative_time(now(),"$time.earliest$"),"$time.earliest$"), latest_time=case(replace("$time.latest$","\d[\.\d]*","")!="",relative_time(now(),if("$time.latest$"="now", "-0","$time.latest$")),"$time.latest$"="", relative_time(now(),"-0"), 1=1, "$time.latest$")|where trigger_time>=earliest_time AND trigger_time < latest_time| timechart span=1d count
